question: Compare Trae Young vs Luka Doncic points per 100 possessions in 2021-22.
notes: PLAN §12 row 7. Source-backed against src_stg_bref_per_100_poss (BBR's per_100_poss player-season table). The plan listed src_bref_per_100_poss; the canonical table in this warehouse is named src_stg_bref_per_100_poss and is marked canonical_source in meta_table_fate. fact_player_game_advanced.poss is only populated for the 2025-26 season in this build, so per-100 cannot be computed on the fly from the canonical advanced box for historical seasons.
